title: Add Products Management & Phone Number Login

requirements.summary: Replace Internet Identity login with phone number-only authentication
acceptanceCriteria: The login screen displays a single phone number input field
No email, password, or Internet Identity prompt is shown
Submitting a valid phone number logs the user in and creates/retrieves their profile
Invalid or empty phone number submissions show an appropriate error message
The backend associates sessions/profiles with the phone number

file_operations.description: Replace the Internet Identity login prompt with a phone number input form. Show a phone number field with validation (empty check, basic format check). On submission, call the modified login flow that accepts a phone number. Display loading state during authentication and error messages for invalid inputs.

Update the login button to trigger a phone number collection flow instead of Internet Identity. When clicked in logged-out state, show a modal or inline form collecting phone number. Pass the phone number to the backend authentication. Maintain the logout functionality to clear queries and reset state.

Update the profile setup modal to pre-populate or associate the user's phone number (already collected during login) with their profile. The phone number should be stored as part of the UserProfile. Continue to collect the user's name on first login.

Replace Internet Identity authentication logic with a phone number-based authentication mechanism. Store the phone number as the user identifier. Implement login(phoneNumber: string) that authenticates using the phone number. Update the identity/principal derivation to use the phone number. Maintain the clear() logout function. Note: This will require coordination with backend authentication but keep the hook's interface similar for minimal downstream changes.

Update the user profile hooks to handle phone number as a required field in UserProfile. Ensure getCallerUserProfile and saveCallerUserProfile work with the phone number-based authentication. The phone number should be included when saving profiles.

requirements.summary: Add admin-only 'Add Product' navigation link to header
acceptanceCriteria: Admin users see an 'Add Product' link in the header navigation on both desktop and mobile
Non-admin users do not see the 'Add Product' link
Clicking 'Add Product' navigates to the product creation form
The product creation form allows entering product name, description, price, stock, and selecting an image
Successfully submitting the form creates a new product and shows a confirmation

file_operations.description: Add an 'Add Product' navigation link in both the desktop and mobile navigation sections. Use the useUserRole hook to check if the current user is an admin. Conditionally render the 'Add Product' link only when isCallerAdmin returns true. The link should navigate to '/create-product' route. Position it between the 'Shop' and 'Cart' links in the navigation order.
